rules.name: This_Account_all_it_s_National_Hierarchy

rightValue.stringValue: This Account & all it's National Hierarchy

rules.label: This Account & all it's National Hierarchy

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts
recordLookups.label: 1 Get Contracts
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts_2
recordLookups.label: 2 Get Contracts 2
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts_3
recordLookups.label: 3 Get Contracts 3
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9

recordLookups.name: Get_Contracts_4
recordLookups.label: 4 Get Contracts 4
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9
